examples.title: CGI Request Handling
examples.code:
ALGORITHM HandleCGIRequest
INPUT: request
OUTPUT: response

BEGIN
 CREATE new process for CGI program
 PASS request data to CGI program
 EXECUTE CGI program
 SEND output back as HTTP response
 TERMINATE process
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode illustrates the CGI request handling process, highlighting the creation of a new process for each request and the termination of the process after execution.

examples.title: Java Servlet Example
examples.explanation: This Java servlet example demonstrates a basic servlet that handles GET requests and returns an HTML response.

examples.explanation: This C CGI example demonstrates a basic CGI program that returns an HTML response.
